name: HRR_TMPL_METRIC_CONFIG_VL
query: SELECT MCB.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, MCB.METRIC_ID METRIC_ID, MCB.DASHBOARD_TMPL_ID DASHBOARD_TMPL_ID, MCB.METRIC_CODE METRIC_CODE, MCB.CONTENT_TYPE_ID CONTENT_TYPE_ID, MCB.DASHBOARD_COLUMN_NAME DASHBOARD_COLUMN_NAME, MCB.RATING_MODEL_ID RATING_MODEL_ID, MCB.USE_AS_AXIS_FLAG USE_AS_AXIS_FLAG, MCB.USE_AS_UNDERLAY_FLAG USE_AS_UNDERLAY_FLAG, MCB.READ_ONLY_FLAG READ_ONLY_FLAG, MCB.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, MCB.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, MCB.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, MCB.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, MCB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, MCB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, MCTL.LABEL LABEL, MCB.SECTION_ID FROM HRR_TMPL_METRIC_CONFIG MCB, HRR_TMPL_METRIC_CONFIG_TL MCTL WHERE MCB.METRIC_ID = MCTL.METRIC_ID AND MCB.ENTERPRISE_ID = MCTL.ENTERPRISE_ID AND MCTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
